name: submit_assignment
description: Submit work for a specific assignment in a course. Supports multiple submission types including online text entry, URL submissions, and file uploads. The submission is recorded for the authenticated user.

parameters.name: assignment_id
parameters.description: The ID of the assignment to submit to.

parameters.name: submission[submission_type]
parameters.description: The type of submission: online_text_entry, online_url, online_upload, media_recording.

parameters.name: submission[body]
parameters.description: The text content for online_text_entry submissions (HTML allowed).

parameters.name: comment[text_comment]
parameters.description: Optional comment to include with the submission.
